title: desmodium cephalotes
intro: Desmodium cephalotes, also known as tick trefoil or head leaf clover, is a perennial legume native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. The health benefits of Desmodium cephalotes include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and it may also be used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Desmodium cephalotes is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or capsule form.
